title: Quiltech
description: Quiltech is an experimental technology & magic modpack for Minecraft 1.18.2
body:
## Quiltech is an experimental modpack for Minecraft 1.18.2

#### Expect breaking changes until the mod list is finalized.

Notable mods:
- Create
- AE2
- EMI
- Tech Reborn
- Botania
- CC: Restitched
- Conjuring
- Expanded Storage
- Modern Dynamics
- Malum
- Guild
- FallingTree
- Adorn

The pack direction will be listed once the mod list is finalized and the pack is moved out of the experimental state.
